name: Chicken and Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin, bone, and halve the chicken breasts.
2. Place the chipped beef at the bottom of a baking dish.
3. Lay the ends of the chicken breasts under the beef and place them on top.
4. Mix together the mushroom soup and sour cream in a bowl.
5. Spread the mixture over the top of the chicken breasts.
6. Dot the surface with chopped bacon.
7. Sprinkle paprika evenly over the dish.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake in an oven preheated to 275 degrees Fahrenheit for 2-1/2 hours.
